title: Grilled Trout A La Germania
description: A traditional German dish featuring delicate, fresh trout, marinated in a blend of herbs and grilled to perfection.
instructions: 1. Rinse the trout fillets under cold water, pat dry with paper towels.
2. In a small bowl, mix together olive oil, lemon juice, parsley, dill, garlic powder, salt, and pepper.
3. Place the trout fillets in a shallow dish and brush the marinade on both sides of the fish.
4. Cover the dish with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
6. Remove the trout from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
7. Grill the trout for 4-6 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
8. Serve immediately, garnished with additional parsley and lemon wedges if desired.
